subcodes.first_line: O thou blossom unfolded in the gardens of God's love! Spring hath come, and the lofty clouds have poured forth their bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورده الموانقه المفتحه فی ریاض محبه الله قد اتی الربیع و فاض الغمام الرفیع
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual springtime, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation
